feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >wanting to discuss an old or upcoming game gets you called a marketer or a shil…

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Freaks and Geeks thread
entry.content: Let's discuss the show Freaks and Geeks.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Remember that episode where Morty asks Rick to make something to make Jessica fa…
entry.content: Remember that episode where Morty asks Rick to make something to make Jessica fall in love with him? So then he does and Jessica becomes obsessed with Morty but it ruins everything? And it’s this dissection of the love potion trope and how it’s basically rape since it removes someone’s agency and it reveals how a seemingly innocent wish belies Morty’s lack of character? They should make a movie like that!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /g/uys I really dont feel so good about this
entry.content: How do we fix this? Is this fixable? Will these prices go down? What are the implications of everything 3x in 3 years? Will these be 4x next year? Is this sustainable? I sense a massive tech problem, but I see no one is concerned (IRL). I have never lived in a time period like this. My entire life, tech has only gone one direction: cheaper and more accessible as newer and better tech replaces the old. There is nothing new. There is only old. Old is getting more expensive AND FAST! Like hyperinfl

No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. entry.title: /g/ Technology: What do you guys think of Bluefin and immutable distros in general? I recently t…
entry.content: What do you guys think of Bluefin and immutable distros in general? I recently tried it and I think it should absolutely be the defacto normgroid recommendation. Much better choice than stuff like Ubuntu and Mint for non-tech people.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Let's face it, you only like Linux because you like the "idea" of an open-source…
entry.content: Let's face it, you only like Linux because you like the "idea" of an open-source OS. If you fairly compared it against Windows on features, UI, UX, reliability, compatibility (backwards, forwards and between systems), not relying on centralized repositories, ease of developing and distributing programs for it, etc. it would lose on every metric.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: When Jesus came to the region of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, >“Wh…
entry.content: When Jesus came to the region of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, >“Who do people say the Son of Man is?” They replied, >“Some say John the Baptist; others say Elijah; and still others, Jeremiah or one of the prophets.” > “But what about you?” he asked. > “Who do you say I am?” Your fortune: （ ´_ゝ`）ﾌｰﾝ

entry.title: /g/ Technology: do 4chan cookies expire for inactivity? i stopped using my secondary laptop with…
entry.content: do 4chan cookies expire for inactivity? i stopped using my secondary laptop with 1 captcha cookie for a week today i wanted to post something and for my surprise i had to wait 60 seconds just to get 4 captchas again + ip blocked for abuse, so i verified my email now i'm doing 3 captchas per post same shit happened to the pc i have at my parents' house, but this time i just imported the cookies from my main laptop with 1 captcha cookie and it got fixed

entry.title: /int/ International: >The April 2011 Fukushima earthquake struck while Endo, then 10 years old, was i…
entry.content: >The April 2011 Fukushima earthquake struck while Endo, then 10 years old, was in class and heavily damaged her school. Her family and their homes survived, and they were not required to evacuate from the subsequent release of radiation at the Fukushima Daiichi Nuclear Power Plant; as she wasn't allowed to go outside, she continued to practice football inside her home, which contributed to her ability to handle the ball in confined spaces. >In a 2023 interview, Endo said that at the time she had

Wollen es nur selbst nicht mehr sehen Wir sperr'n uns ein, sind lieber klein - Schattenfiguren im Sonnenschein Unzufrieden, wie gelähmt. Fühlen uns wie Löwen, die man zähmt Weißt du nicht mehr wie es mal war, an diesem regnerischem Tag? Als alles grau gewesen ist, du trotzdem rausgegangen bist? entry.title: /int/ International: I don’t know who needs to hear this
entry.content: But I’ve just discovered that I’ve been attaching to people and things too quick, too excessive and too hard and it’s been making me feel extremely fragile, vulnerable, desperate and distressed. Also very manipulable and exploitable by people sensing my attachment issues i.e. psychos. To all my hyperattachment homies out there know that nothing is irreplaceable and feel free to detach yourselves from anything draining yo asses.
